metadata.description: Detect valuation regimes using percentiles vs history/peers and link them to macro/rates signals. Use when the user asks whether a market/sector/name is expensive/cheap relative to history or wants valuation percentile analysis.

plugins.name: us-valuation-regime-detector-plugin
